case_title: CACV OF COLORADO LLC VS. ROMANO DEGUZMAN

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
